svg.text: Selection reverses a railed organism exactly where its pools
two railed OLMo-7B organisms resumed under the same score-based oracle selector — keep the 2 of 6 lowest-risk
candidates per item, then fine-tune; 4 rounds, one run per state. Verbatim candidate pools: figure result_crossfamily_oracle_pools.
A. Free-generation risk, round by round
started railed at 1.000 — flat through all four rounds
pool spread 0.000 in every round: all six candidates score
identically on every item (missing force, not resistance)
B. Within-pool material the selector could act on
